indexingManager.title: Indexing Manager
indexingManager.description: Manage content indexing states to ensure search accuracy.
indexingManager.indexingDesc: Reindex selected content. Already published items will be automatically republished.
indexingManager.indexingHint: Best for updating stale or inconsistent search results.
indexingManager.deindexingDesc: Remove content from the search index in all environments.
indexingManager.deindexingHint: Use for obsolete or sensitive content that shouldn't appear in search.
indexingManager.publishingDesc: Force-publish content to the target environment regardless of current status.
indexingManager.publishingHint: Useful to push urgent updates live without waiting for the standard flow.
indexingManager.unpublishingDesc: Remove content from the Publish environment while keeping it in Author.
indexingManager.unpublishingHint: Content stays editable but becomes invisible to the public.

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.description: Verify the current status of AEM content indexing.

indexingStats.title: Indexing Stats
indexingStats.description: View performance statistics for indexing and reindexing operations.
indexingStats.noStats: No indexing stats available yet. Run an indexAll or reindexAll operation to generate stats.
indexingStats.noReindexStats: No REINDEX ALL operations recorded yet.

doubleCheck.title: Double Check
doubleCheck.description: Compare content between the connector and the search engine index.
doubleCheck.unprocessedDesc: Content accessible in the source (HTTP 200) but not yet processed by the connector.
doubleCheck.missingDesc: Content present in the connector but not indexed in the search engine.
doubleCheck.extraDesc: Content present in the search engine index but not found in the connector.
doubleCheck.indexAllFailed: Failed to send Index All request
